steps.title: Focus on shared traits
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize a similarity between Uros House and Golden Waters. The notes show that both works are sculptures by Luciana Vargas and that both use LED light. Details about domes, tubes, and size describe differences or single-work features, so they should not be the focus.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and one-side details
steps.content: Choice A - Uros House is an LED light sculpture made by Luciana Vargas, as is Golden Waters directly states the shared artist and shared medium. Choice B - The smooth LED domes of Luciana Vargas's Uros House stand in contrast to the tangled LED tubes of Golden Waters explicitly emphasizes a difference. Choice C - Luciana Vargas is the artist behind Uros House - a sculpture made of smooth multicolored LED domes discusses only one sculpture. Choice D - At 118,080 cubic feet in size, Luciana Vargas's Golden Waters cuts a larger figure than the 250-cubic-foot Uros House highlights a size contrast. The answer is A.
